content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body brought out the resources, and then went to the Innocent Abyss, sent these resources to the hands of the real body copy body, and brought them back to Tianshan Pavilion.

In this way, I breathed a sigh of relief.

"Now that my True Body Replication Body is getting stronger and stronger, when the True Body Replication Body breaks through to the seventh balance realm, the value of Ao Chen's copy body will not be much!" Ye Tian muttered.

After all, at that time, he could directly compete with the Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor, and he didn't need Ao Chen's copy body.

Of course, there is still some use for the moment.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

After Ye Tian obtained this massive amount of resources, he quickly refined these resources to improve his cultivation, and his strength was also rapidly improving.

At this rate of progress, at most a billion primeval epoch years, or hundreds of millions of primeval epoch years, he can be raised to the limit of the sixth balance and qualified to attack the seventh balance realm.

At that time, he would definitely be invincible in the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm.

Reincarnation domain.

The reincarnation realm where the reincarnation clan is located is very calm at the moment, but the reincarnation mountain of the reincarnation realm is not calm at all.

At this moment, many Origin Dao Ancestors who had broken the boundary of the Nine Moments were looking sad.

The reincarnation clan is immortal and indestructible, even if the number is scarce, as long as they don't provoke the reincarnation celestial clan and the reincarnation source clan, their life is still very comfortable.

But now, they are panicking.

"Blood Crow really can't bear it?"

One of the Origin Dao Ancestors asked.

"I can't bear it!" Another Origin Dao Ancestor said helplessly: "His Origin Mark is about to shatter, once it is shattered, then it will be completely dead." "

If Ye Tian was here, he would definitely be shocked, the Reincarnation Clan was following the path of the Origin Dao Ancestor, with the protection of the Origin of the Reincarnation Domain, immortal and immortal, how could it fall?

"The blood crow is really reckless, why do you want to explore that taboo, now I'm worried that not only the blood crow, but if there is a problem with the origin of the entire reincarnation domain, it will be troublesome!"

"No, for countless years, there has been no problem with the origin of the reincarnation domain, even if the blood crow has touched the taboo, but so far, the other party has not done anything!"

"Who knows, in short, if you are not careful this time, the entire reincarnation clan will have a problem! The reincarnation heavenly clan and the reincarnation source clan do not rely on the origin, but our foundation is in the reincarnation origin!"

......

Deep in the origin of the reincarnation domain.

A gray figure sat here cross-legged, he was the Origin Dao Ancestor of the Reincarnation Clan, who broke the boundary of the nine times, the Blood Crow.

Now.

He was also full of despair.

"If it can't be stabilized, the Origin Mark will have to crumble in a million primeval epochs at most!"

The Blood Raven regretted it.

Isn't it just that the origin in the depths of the reincarnation domain is missing a part, and this strange phenomenon is not the first time it has happened, but it has happened many times.

This phenomenon has been mentioned in the ancient traditions, and the reincarnation of the scheming clan is not allowed to probe and leak out.

He had reached the limit of the Nine Realms, and he had not been able to break through for countless years, and he also wanted to reach the realm above the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

He felt that the phenomenon in the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain definitely contained a great secret, coupled with the fact that the last time the ancestor failed to impact the higher realm, but he had chopped a fragment, which contained the rules of the higher realm.

He felt that beyond the reincarnation domain, there was a wider world, and the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain might connect to the unknown place.

Thereupon.

He ventured to investigate.

As a result, when the origin of the reincarnation domain was once again missing, he directly broke into it, and was greeted by a finger.

With just one finger, his body shattered, and this finger also affected the Origin Mark he left in the Origin of the Reincarnation Domain.

As long as the Origin Mark does not die, the Origin Dao Ancestor will not really fall.

But his Origin Mark was shattered by a force, and now it was completely unstable, and was about to turn into ashes.

"The owner of that finger is definitely an existence beyond the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, I angered them!!!"

Of course, this also confirms that there is indeed a higher realm above the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Click!

He had an extra crack in his body.

In this regard, the blood crow no longer cared, anyway, he was sure to die.

However, he was not willing to fall like this.

He wanted to spy on the true secrets, but the other Origin Dao Ancestors of the Reincarnation Tribes didn't want him to continue to investigate, for fear of angering that existence and causing the entire Reincarnation Clan to be destroyed.

However, if he doesn't know the truth, he is unwilling!

"If I die, what does the reincarnation of the Evil Clan have to do with me?"

He decided that he wanted to explore it again.

Soon.

He came to the depths of the Origin of the Reincarnation Domain again, and burned all the Origin Power, and rushed into it again.

"Blood Raven, what are you going to do?"

The Origin Dao Ancestor of the Reincarnation Clan, who was furious, thought that the Blood Crow would wait quietly to die or find some other way to restore his life.

But I never expected that the blood crow would pass again.

However, it was too late for them to stop.

Rumble!!!!

He stepped in again, peering into the shadows.

In an instant, he saw more things, and the existence that hit him hard didn't strike at the first time, obviously that person didn't keep looking here, but he was unlucky last time, and he was hit hard as soon as he came in.

But after a few breaths, the being reappeared.

This time.

The Blood Raven saw the other party's appearance clearly.

This is a humanoid existence that exudes golden light, and its aura is incomparably terrifying, far surpassing the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"How dare you enter here and look for death!"

A big hand grabbed.

The Blood Raven tried to dodge, but couldn't move.

Rumble!!!

The blood crow was directly caught by the other party, and then pinched to death, and the origin was completely shattered and turned into ashes.

At this point, the blood raven fell and died.

And just after the fall of the blood crow, another figure appeared.

"Sorry, another little bug has come out?"

"Yes, a small bug came out of the origin, but they are bound by the origin, and even if they get here, they can't come out unless they can break through again!"

"Hahaha, these little insects still want to break through again, under the forbidden Dao array, they can't even touch the rules of the Supreme Dao, how can they comprehend the breakthrough?"

"I remember that before the 600,000 Dao Era, a powerful little insect broke out before he died, and he also destroyed the formation, severely damaged one of our clansmen, and it took us a long time to repair. "

"That's a special case, and the little bugs after that will affect the formation at most, but it's useless at all. "
